mano_cua.result_summary: 字体切换功能正常：选择Manrope后点击Update preferences，html元素class从font-inter变为font-manrope，字体设置已保存并应用。下拉选择时无实时预览（class不立即更新），需点保存按钮后生效
mano_cua.last_reasoning: After clicking Update preferences, html class changed from font-inter to font-manrope. Font preference saved and applied. Toast showed submitted values with font: manrope. Feature works correctly.
